page_metadata.biotools__summary: ENT is a highly scalable genotype phasing algorithm based on entropy minimization. ENT is capable of phasing both unrelated and related genotypes coming from complex pedigrees.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ENT is a highly scalable genotype phasing algorithm based on entropy minimization. ENT is capable of phasing both unrelated and related genotypes coming from complex pedigrees.
